abstract_en: A survey of world-model techniques for embodied agents and robotics.
abstract_zh: 综述具身智能体与机器人中的世界模型技术。
editorial_summary_zh: 帮助读者快速建立具身世界模型的全景认知。
editorial_summary_en: A useful overview of embodied world-model methods.
why_it_matters: Survey papers help new readers enter the topic quickly.
